entries.source: "Explain black holes simply"
entries.value: "ब्ल्याक होल (कृष्ण छिद्र) लाई सरल रूपमा व्याख्या गर्नुहोस्"

entries.source: "Help me understand photosynthesis"
entries.value: "मलाई प्रकाश संश्लेषण बुझ्न मद्दत गर्नुहोस्"

entries.source: "Teach me how interest works"
entries.value: "ब्याज कसरी काम गर्छ, मलाई सिकाउनुहोस्"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Learn Anything on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Foundations learning का लागि inspir मा Learn Anything प्रयोग गर्ने व्यावहारिक guide, prompt, study loop र सुरक्षित AI बानी सहित।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अझ बलियो study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer भन्दा सानो first step माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI लाई result मात्र होइन, तपाईंको reasoning check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: जिज्ञासु विद्यार्थीहरू, छात्रछात्रा, अभिभावकहरू र आफैं सिक्न चाहनेहरू जसले सुरुवात गर्नका लागि एउटा सहज ठाउँ खोजिरहेका छन्।

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory बाट idea फिर्ता लेखेर finish गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: आधारभूत कुराहरू

entries.source: Get examples at your level.
entries.value: आफ्नो level मा examples पाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: लामो उत्तर दिनुको सट्टा, inspir ले तपाईंलाई सरल आधार, गहिरो मार्ग, वा व्यावहारिक उदाहरण छनौट गर्न मद्दत गर्छ।

entries.source: Learn Anything
entries.value: जे पनि सिक्नुहोस्

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Free AI Tutor सँग Learn Anything निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: बिल्कुल जे कुरामा curious हुनुहुन्छ? सोध्नुहोस्, explore गर्नुहोस्, र आफ्नो pace मा deeper जानुहोस्। तपाईंको buddy ले ideas लाई practical, memorable, र build गर्न सजिलो बनाउँछ। प्रयास गर्नुहोस्: "Explain how the stock market actually works."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide
entries.value: Free AI Tutor सँग Learn Anything: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question.
entries.value: useful next question सहित निस्कनुहोस्।

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: try गर्ने prompts

entries.source: Start the live mode at Learn Anything. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Socratic Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Learn Anything मा live mode सुरु गर्नुहोस्। neighbouring learning format चाहनुहुन्छ भने Socratic Instruction try गर्नुहोस्। platform को broader view का लागि AI learning companion ले सबैका लागि के गर्नुपर्छ पढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: mode लाई तपाईं के सिक्न वा produce गर्न खोज्दै हुनुहुन्छ भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: त्यो difference flow मा देखिन्छ। एउटा giant response को सट्टा best sessions loop हुँदै अघि बढ्छन्: goal set गर्नुहोस्, केही try गर्नुहोस्, feedback पाउनुहोस्, weak spot repair गर्नुहोस्, र next action choose गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: त्यो focus महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। general chatbot ले लगभग सबै कुरा answer गर्न सक्छ, तर learning mode ले conversation लाई shape दिन्छ। यसले idea stick हुन मद्दत गर्ने thinking, practice, feedback, वा exploration तर्फ तपाईंलाई nudge गर्छ।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: यो cheating नगरी AI सँग study गर्ने same habit हो: learner active राख्नुहोस्। AI तपाईंको thinking मा feedback दिँदा सबैभन्दा useful हुन्छ।

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: यो mode विशेष रूपमा यस्ता learners का लागि useful छ जो चाहन्छन्:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: चरणलाई आफ्नै शब्दमा प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Understand the core idea.
entries.value: मुख्य idea बुझ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Learn Anything when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: छिटो सुरु हुने तर तपाईंअनुसार adapt हुने session चाहनुहुन्छ भने Learn Anything प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। पहिलो goal प्रभावशाली सुनिनु होइन। पहिलो goal अर्को step सम्भव महसुस गराउनु हो।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: यो mode ले केमा मद्दत गर्छ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: अब कहाँ जाने

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तपाईं आफ्नो वास्तविक समस्याको rough version बाट पनि सुरु गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। messy first prompt ठीकै छ। सुरु गरेपछि session ले level, audience, deadline, र style clarify गर्न सक्छ।
